title: Visualizing Data
scenario: Create a line graph illustrating the growth of a company's annual revenue over the past 5 years. The graph should include a clear title, labels on both axes, and a key explaining the different colors used for each year's data. The output should be a 100-word markdown codeblock that can be copied and pasted into a Jupyter notebook.
constraints: Must include a key explaining the colors used

evaluationCriteria.description: The output should be correct Markdown syntax and can be copied and pasted into a Jupyter notebook.
The graph should accurately represent the growth of the company's annual revenue over the past 5 years.
The graph should include clear labels on both axes and a title.
